user_system_path: #431: the conviction engine left primaryOutcomeDeadline null behind an inline TODO. Infer a SOFT outcome deadline from natural-language month/start cues in the same supporting signals already fetched by runConvictionEngine ('April start', 'starts in May', 'April/May start') — distinct from inferHardDeadline (baby/lease, a date that cannot move). Pure deterministic extractor + earliest-month resolution + safe-silence on the modal 'may start'. No DB, no paid calls; proven in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: lib/briefing/conviction-engine.ts (new pure inferPrimaryOutcomeDeadline + wired into the situation model) + lib/briefing/__tests__/conviction-engine-ce.test.ts (8 new fixtures) + control-plane. No schema, no deps, no paid calls.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/conviction-engine-ce.test.ts && npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build
required_browser_proof: N/A — deterministic harness change to a pure inference function; primaryOutcomeDeadline is written into SituationModel and has no downstream consumer/UI, so a unit-tested extractor is the closure standard.
acceptance_condition: inferPrimaryOutcomeDeadline extracts month/start cues from supporting signals and populates SituationModel.primaryOutcomeDeadline, with test fixtures proving the inference (and quiet on the modal 'may start'). Issue #431 acceptance met.
anti_regression_checks: deterministic; no runtime/schema change; primaryOutcomeDeadline was previously always null so populating it is purely additive
modal 'may start' must not fabricate a May deadline (safe-silence)
stop_condition: Stop when the PR is merged. Between-rungs after; owner names the next seam.
next_command: Owner: review/merge the #431 PR. Remaining open issues (#420/#402/#382 owner-gated, #445 complete, #165 inbox) are not agent-bangable without owner decisions.
